title: cyclosorus pumilis
intro: Cyclosorus pumilis, also known as the dwarf lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties. Cyclosorus pumilis is said to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to improve various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for its health benefits, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
